title: Deep Drilling
description: An addon for Create, adding powerful drills that extract ores from deep within the earth
body:
# Overview
Deep Drilling is an addon to [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) that adds rare "Ore Nodes" throughout the world, yielding different resources based on the biome.

![A collage of four screenshots showing respectively: a boulder of crimsite in a mountain, a boulder of veridium in the ocean, a boulder of ochrum in a badlands biome, and a bouler of asurine in a grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e0364e63eba3917584bab9e3c704c777e021606.png)

_Boulders of crimsite (iron), veridium (copper), ochrum (gold), and asurine (zinc) respectively_

Construct large drills, augment them with modules and drill heads, then fuel your factory with unlimited resources extracted from the very center of the earth!

![3 drills side-by-side, one with a head made out of andesite, one with a head made out of copper and 2 attached modules, and one with a head made out of brass with 4 attached modules](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95d5fa51833b055b1616366ba81786849a4303f6.png)

_Minimise the upkeep cost of replacing heads, obtain only building blocks, or maximise SPEED_

# Features
- **Ore Nodes** generate in the world
  - Each variant appears in only specific biomes
  - This encourages exploration and the creation of multiple outposts to exploit each type
- A new specialised **Drill**
  - The only tool powerful enough to exploit these Ore Nodes
  - Requires kinetic power and...
- ... **Drill Heads**
  - Each one has differing durabilities, speeds, resource qualities, and production costs
  - Andesite is inexpensive and easily automatable without drilling, but slow
  - Copper is very fast with more durability, but can only produce building blocks
  - Brass is fast with a high amount of durability and better resource output, but costs a lot to produce
  - Drill Heads can be improved with fortune, efficiency, and unbreaking enchantments
- Attach **Modules** for even more output
  - Up to 5 can be placed onto a drill at once
  - The **Collection Filter** is a near necessity, preventing drops from spewing onto the ground
  - The **Sludge Pump** allows Drill Heads to function faster while taking less damage, but loses quality drops to wasteful Sludge
  - The **Drill Overclock** greatly increases drilling speed but causes Drill Heads to take more damage
  - _(definitely more to come: nuance and options are cool, objective metas are boring)_

## Requirements
For Forge you need
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

For Fabric you need
- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
